name: FERRARI
description: Founded by Enzo Ferrari in 1947, Ferrari is an Italian luxury sports car manufacturer renowned for its high-performance vehicles. Initially producing race cars before road cars, Ferrari's first commercial success was the 125 S in 1947. In 1969, Ferrari went public but remained under the control of the Ferrari family. The brand is best known for its iconic symbols: the prancing horse and the roar of its V12 engines. Today, Ferrari continues to produce high-performance sports cars and Formula One racing vehicles. Its vehicles are highly sought after by collectors worldwide due to their speed, luxury, and exclusivity.
